meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Param Singh: Building with Mistral: Open, Powerful, and Ready to Scale
meta.description:
Param Singh, Partner Solution Architect at Mistral AI offered an insightful session on developing and deploying Enterprise AI applications using Mistral AI. 

Attendees discovered the spectrum of Mistral's models, from Large to Small, and everything in between, and learned about Mistral AI Studio and how to start developing and tailoring your AI applications. 

Singh discussed flexible deployment options, including serverless, Cloud, on-premise, Cloud-VPC, and dedicated instances. He also provided practical tips, insights, and best practices for moving your AI projects into production
